'''Galvronos Givin Interchanges, Limited''' was a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] company who worked in partnership with [[Galladinium Galactic Exports]] to produce the [[EVS BBS-909]], a fast acting sealing mechanism to counter [[Hull/Legends|hull]] breaches.

{{Company-stub}}
